title: pilosella acrothyrsa subsp. fleischeriana
intro: Pilosella acrothyrsa subsp. fleischeriana, also known as Fleischer's mouse-ear hawk's-beard, is a rare subspecies of the Pilosella acrothyrsa plant, which belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pilosella acrothyrsa subsp. fleischeriana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
